mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_path ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM learning_path
AND (language = #{language} OR language = '通用')
AND direction = #{direction}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_path (name, direction, language, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{direction}, #{language}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_path SET name = #{name}, direction = #{direction}, language = #{language}, description = #{description}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO path_chapter (path_id, name, order_num, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{pathId}, #{name}, #{orderNum}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO path_level (chapter_id, name, order_num, problem_ids, knowledge_points, unlock_condition, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{chapterId}, #{name}, #{orderNum}, #{problemIds}, #{knowledgePoints}, #{unlockCondition}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE path_level SET name = #{name}, order_num = #{orderNum}, problem_ids = #{problemIds}, knowledge_points = #{knowledgePoints}, unlock_condition = #{unlockCondition}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_path_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND path_id = #{pathId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_path_progress (user_id, path_id, current_chapter_id, current_level_id, completed_chapters, completed_levels, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{pathId}, #{currentChapterId}, #{currentLevelId}, #{completedChapters}, #{completedLevels}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_path_progress SET current_chapter_id = #{currentChapterId}, current_level_id = #{currentLevelId}, completed_chapters = #{completedChapters}, completed_levels = #{completedLevels}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assessment_question (language, direction, question, options, correct_answer, difficulty, knowledge_point, create_time) VALUES (#{language}, #{direction}, #{question}, #{options}, #{correctAnswer}, #{difficulty}, #{knowledgePoint}, NOW())
INSERT INTO user_assessment (user_id, language, direction, score, result, ability_level, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{language}, #{direction}, #{score}, #{result}, #{abilityLevel}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_assessment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND language = #{language} AND direction = #{direction} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
